title: Authentication System with Protected Routes
description: Implement complete user authentication flow using Supabase Auth including registration, login, logout, password reset, and session management. Create auth context/hooks for client components, implement protected route middleware for authenticated pages, and build all necessary UI components (login form, registration form, password reset flow). Includes creating user profile record in users table upon registration. Out of scope: OAuth providers (Google, Apple) - email/password only for MVP.
